examples.sentence: حضرنا مُحَاضَرَة أكاديمية مكثفة حول تأثير الذكاء الاصطناعي في التعليم الجامعي الحديث
examples.translation_english: We attended an intensive academic lecture on the impact of AI in modern university education.
examples.translation_native: We attended an intensive academic lecture on the impact of AI in modern university education.

examples.sentence: تعتمد مَنْهَجِيَّة البحث العلمي على تحليل البيانات بدقة للوصول إلى نتائج موثوقة
examples.translation_english: The scientific research methodology relies on analyzing data accurately to reach reliable results.
examples.translation_native: The scientific research methodology relies on analyzing data accurately to reach reliable results.

examples.sentence: قدم الطالب أُطْرُوحَة متميزة نالت إعجاب لجنة التحكيم في نهاية العام الدراسي
examples.translation_english: The student presented an excellent thesis that impressed the jury at the end of the year.
examples.translation_native: The student presented an excellent thesis that impressed the jury at the end of the year.

examples.sentence: قمت بمراجعة مُسَوَّدَة المقال قبل تسليمه للأستاذ لضمان خلوه من الأخطاء اللغوية
examples.translation_english: I reviewed the draft of the article before submitting it to the professor to ensure it is error-free.
examples.translation_native: I reviewed the draft of the article before submitting it to the professor to ensure it is error-free.

examples.sentence: تتطلب المسائل الرياضية المعقدة مُقَارَبَة إبداعية لحلها بعيداً عن الطرق التقليدية المعتادة
examples.translation_english: Complex mathematical problems require a creative approach to solve them beyond traditional methods.
examples.translation_native: Complex mathematical problems require a creative approach to solve them beyond traditional methods.

examples.sentence: يجب إجراء مُعَايَرَة دقيقة لأجهزة المختبر قبل البدء بتجارب الكيمياء الحيوية الحساسة
examples.translation_english: Precise calibration of laboratory equipment must be done before starting sensitive biochemical experiments.
examples.translation_native: Precise calibration of laboratory equipment must be done before starting sensitive biochemical experiments.

examples.sentence: تأكد من مُطَابَقَة النتائج التجريبية مع الفرضيات العلمية التي وضعتها في بحثك
examples.translation_english: Ensure the matching of experimental results with the scientific hypotheses you set in your research.
examples.translation_native: Ensure the matching of experimental results with the scientific hypotheses you set in your research.

examples.sentence: قام الأستاذ بإجراء مُعَايَنَة ميدانية للموقع الأثري ضمن رحلة المدرسة التعليمية السنوية
examples.translation_english: The professor conducted a field inspection of the archaeological site during the annual school trip.
examples.translation_native: The professor conducted a field inspection of the archaeological site during the annual school trip.

examples.sentence: تعد مُطَالَعَة الكتب الأدبية الكلاسيكية وسيلة ممتازة لتطوير مهارات الكتابة الإبداعية للطلاب
examples.translation_english: Reading classic literary books is an excellent way to develop students' creative writing skills.
examples.translation_native: Reading classic literary books is an excellent way to develop students' creative writing skills.

examples.sentence: أدار المعلم مُحَاوَرَة فلسفية عميقة حول الأخلاق في عصر التكنولوجيا الرقمية المتسارع
examples.translation_english: The teacher led a deep philosophical dialogue about ethics in the age of fast-paced digital technology.
examples.translation_native: The teacher led a deep philosophical dialogue about ethics in the age of fast-paced digital technology.

examples.sentence: حل تلك مُعَادَلَة التفاضلية يتطلب فهماً عميقاً لقوانين الفيزياء والرياضيات المتقدمة جداً
examples.translation_english: Solving that differential equation requires a deep understanding of the laws of physics and advanced mathematics.
examples.translation_native: Solving that differential equation requires a deep understanding of the laws of physics and advanced mathematics.

examples.sentence: أجرينا مُقَارَنَة شاملة بين الأنظمة السياسية المختلفة في العالم ضمن مادة العلوم الاجتماعية
examples.translation_english: We conducted a comprehensive comparison between different political systems in the world in social studies.
examples.translation_native: We conducted a comprehensive comparison between different political systems in the world in social studies.

examples.sentence: تتضمن مادة علوم الحاسب دراسة مُعَالَجَة البيانات الضخمة باستخدام خوارزميات برمجية حديثة ومعقدة
examples.translation_english: Computer science includes studying big data processing using modern and complex software algorithms.
examples.translation_native: Computer science includes studying big data processing using modern and complex software algorithms.

examples.sentence: ناقش الطلاب مبدأ مُسَاوَاة الفرص في التعليم كحق أساسي من حقوق الإنسان العالمية
examples.translation_english: The students discussed the principle of equality of opportunity in education as a fundamental human right.
examples.translation_native: The students discussed the principle of equality of opportunity in education as a fundamental human right.

examples.sentence: تعتمد التجارب العلمية في المختبر على دقة مُشَاهَدَة التفاعلات الكيميائية وتدوين النتائج فوراً
examples.translation_english: Scientific experiments in the lab depend on the accuracy of observing chemical reactions and recording results immediately.
examples.translation_native: Scientific experiments in the lab depend on the accuracy of observing chemical reactions and recording results immediately.

examples.sentence: أطلق اتحاد الطلبة مُبَادَرَة بيئية تهدف إلى تقليل استخدام البلاستيك داخل الحرم الجامعي
examples.translation_english: The student union launched an environmental initiative aiming to reduce plastic use on campus.
examples.translation_native: The student union launched an environmental initiative aiming to reduce plastic use on campus.

examples.sentence: تزيد مُشَارَكَة الطلاب في الأنشطة الصفية من قدرتهم على التفكير النقدي والتحليل المنطقي
examples.translation_english: Student participation in classroom activities increases their ability for critical thinking and logical analysis.
examples.translation_native: Student participation in classroom activities increases their ability for critical thinking and logical analysis.

examples.sentence: درسنا في مادة التاريخ أهمية مُصَالَحَة الشعوب بعد انتهاء النزاعات والحروب العالمية الكبرى
examples.translation_english: We studied in history the importance of reconciliation of peoples after the end of major global conflicts and wars.
examples.translation_native: We studied in history the importance of reconciliation of peoples after the end of major global conflicts and wars.

examples.sentence: تجنب الطالب الدخول في مُجَادَلَة عقيمة مع زملائه حول موضوعات لا تستند إلى حقائق
examples.translation_english: The student avoided entering into a futile argument with his peers about topics not based on facts.
examples.translation_native: The student avoided entering into a futile argument with his peers about topics not based on facts.

examples.sentence: نظم النادي الأدبي مُبَارَزَة شعرية بين الطلاب الموهوبين في فن الإلقاء والبلاغة العربية
examples.translation_english: The literary club organized a poetry duel between students talented in the art of recitation and Arabic rhetoric.
examples.translation_native: The literary club organized a poetry duel between students talented in the art of recitation and Arabic rhetoric.

examples.sentence: تفرض اللوائح المدرسية مُعَاقَبَة صارمة على الطلاب الذين يغشون في الاختبارات النهائية الرسمية
examples.translation_english: School regulations impose strict punishment on students who cheat in official final exams.
examples.translation_native: School regulations impose strict punishment on students who cheat in official final exams.

examples.sentence: قدم المعلم مُعَاوَنَة إضافية للطلاب الذين يواجهون صعوبات في فهم مادة الرياضيات المتقدمة
examples.translation_english: The teacher provided additional assistance to students facing difficulties in understanding advanced mathematics.
examples.translation_native: The teacher provided additional assistance to students facing difficulties in understanding advanced mathematics.

examples.sentence: تتطلب التجارب الفيزيائية مُطَاوَعَة المواد للضغط والحرارة العالية للحصول على نتائج دقيقة وموثوقة
examples.translation_english: Physical experiments require the compliance of materials to pressure and high heat to obtain accurate and reliable results.
examples.translation_native: Physical experiments require the compliance of materials to pressure and high heat to obtain accurate and reliable results.

examples.sentence: فاز فريق مدرستنا في مُسَابَقَة الروبوتات الوطنية بعد تصميم نموذج مبتكر وعملي جداً
examples.translation_english: Our school team won the national robotics competition after designing an innovative and very practical model.
examples.translation_native: Our school team won the national robotics competition after designing an innovative and very practical model.

examples.sentence: شاهدنا مُبَارَاة كرة القدم النهائية بين فريق مدرستنا والمدرسة المنافسة في الملعب الرئيسي
examples.translation_english: We watched the final football match between our school team and the rival school at the main stadium.
examples.translation_native: We watched the final football match between our school team and the rival school at the main stadium.

examples.sentence: خضع الطالب لـ مُقَابَلَة شخصية للقبول في البرنامج الصيفي المرموق للتدريب في شركة تقنية
examples.translation_english: The student underwent a personal interview for admission to the prestigious summer program for training at a tech company.
examples.translation_native: The student underwent a personal interview for admission to the prestigious summer program for training at a tech company.

examples.sentence: قرأنا مُقْتَطَفَة أدبية من رواية مشهورة لتحليل أسلوب الكاتب في استخدام الصور البلاغية
examples.translation_english: We read a literary excerpt from a famous novel to analyze the writer's style in using rhetorical images.
examples.translation_native: We read a literary excerpt from a famous novel to analyze the writer's style in using rhetorical images.

examples.sentence: تساعد ممارسة مُحَادَثَة اللغة الإنجليزية بطلاقة الطلاب على التواصل بفعالية مع زملائهم الدوليين
examples.translation_english: Practicing English conversation fluently helps students communicate effectively with their international peers.
examples.translation_native: Practicing English conversation fluently helps students communicate effectively with their international peers.

examples.sentence: كتب الطالب مُقَدِّمَة قوية لبحثه العلمي لجذب انتباه القارئ منذ السطور الأولى للمقال
examples.translation_english: The student wrote a strong introduction for his scientific research to attract the reader's attention from the first lines.
examples.translation_native: The student wrote a strong introduction for his scientific research to attract the reader's attention from the first lines.

examples.sentence: لخصت خَاتِمَة التقرير أهم النتائج التي توصلنا إليها بعد أشهر من البحث الميداني
examples.translation_english: The report's conclusion summarized the most important results we reached after months of field research.
examples.translation_native: The report's conclusion summarized the most important results we reached after months of field research.

examples.sentence: يُعتبر مُدَرِّس مادة الفيزياء مرجعاً أساسياً للطلاب الذين يطمحون لدراسة الهندسة في المستقبل
examples.translation_english: The physics teacher is considered a primary reference for students aspiring to study engineering in the future.
examples.translation_native: The physics teacher is considered a primary reference for students aspiring to study engineering in the future.

examples.sentence: اجتمع مُدِير المدرسة مع أولياء الأمور لمناقشة تطوير المرافق الرياضية والتعليمية في المؤسسة
examples.translation_english: The school principal met with parents to discuss developing sports and educational facilities in the institution.
examples.translation_native: The school principal met with parents to discuss developing sports and educational facilities in the institution.

examples.sentence: قدم مُوَجِّه الطلاب نصائح قيمة حول اختيار التخصص الجامعي المناسب لقدراتهم واهتماماتهم الشخصية
examples.translation_english: The student counselor provided valuable advice on choosing the university major suitable for their abilities and interests.
examples.translation_native: The student counselor provided valuable advice on choosing the university major suitable for their abilities and interests.

examples.sentence: دعا القسم مُحَاضِر زائر من جامعة دولية لتقديم سلسلة ندوات حول التغير المناخي
examples.translation_english: The department invited a visiting lecturer from an international university to present a series of seminars on climate change.
examples.translation_native: The department invited a visiting lecturer from an international university to present a series of seminars on climate change.

examples.sentence: قضينا معظم وقتنا في مُخْتَبَر الكيمياء لإجراء تجارب عملية حول خصائص العناصر المختلفة
examples.translation_english: We spent most of our time in the chemistry laboratory conducting practical experiments on properties of different elements.
examples.translation_native: We spent most of our time in the chemistry laboratory conducting practical experiments on properties of different elements.

examples.sentence: تجمع مئات الطلاب في مُدَرَّج الجامعة لحضور حفل استقبال الطلاب الجدد لهذا العام
examples.translation_english: Hundreds of students gathered in the university auditorium to attend the reception ceremony for new students this year.
examples.translation_native: Hundreds of students gathered in the university auditorium to attend the reception ceremony for new students this year.

examples.sentence: تعد مَكْتَبَة الجامعة مكاناً مثالياً للدراسة الهادئة والبحث عن مصادر علمية ومراجع متنوعة
examples.translation_english: The university library is an ideal place for quiet study and searching for scientific sources and diverse references.
examples.translation_native: The university library is an ideal place for quiet study and searching for scientific sources and diverse references.

examples.sentence: نظم طلاب الفنون مَعْرِض إبداعي لعرض لوحاتهم ومنحوتاتهم الفنية أمام الجمهور وأولياء الأمور
examples.translation_english: Art students organized a creative exhibition to display their paintings and sculptures before the public and parents.
examples.translation_native: Art students organized a creative exhibition to display their paintings and sculptures before the public and parents.

examples.sentence: يغطي مُقَرَّر الأدب العربي الحديث أهم الكتاب والشعراء الذين أثروا في الثقافة المعاصرة
examples.translation_english: The modern Arabic literature course covers the most important writers and poets who influenced contemporary culture.
examples.translation_native: The modern Arabic literature course covers the most important writers and poets who influenced contemporary culture.

examples.sentence: يسعى الطلاب لتحسين مُسْتَوَى أدائهم الأكاديمي من خلال الالتزام بالحضور والمشاركة في النقاشات
examples.translation_english: Students strive to improve their academic performance level by committing to attendance and participating in discussions.
examples.translation_native: Students strive to improve their academic performance level by committing to attendance and participating in discussions.

examples.sentence: حافظ الطالب على مُعَدَّل تراكمي مرتفع بفضل جهوده المستمرة في الدراسة والتحضير للاختبارات
examples.translation_english: The student maintained a high cumulative GPA thanks to his continuous efforts in studying and preparing for exams.
examples.translation_native: The student maintained a high cumulative GPA thanks to his continuous efforts in studying and preparing for exams.

examples.sentence: تعتبر الشهادة الجامعية مُؤَهِّل أساسي للحصول على فرص عمل متميزة في سوق العمل التنافسي
examples.translation_english: A university degree is considered a basic qualification to obtain excellent job opportunities in the competitive job market.
examples.translation_native: A university degree is considered a basic qualification to obtain excellent job opportunities in the competitive job market.

examples.sentence: كرمت المدرسة الطالب مُتَفَوِّق في نهاية العام الدراسي تقديراً لإنجازاته الأكاديمية والرياضية الملحوظة
examples.translation_english: The school honored the outstanding student at the end of the school year in recognition of his notable academic and sports achievements.
examples.translation_native: The school honored the outstanding student at the end of the school year in recognition of his notable academic and sports achievements.

examples.sentence: يُعرف الطالب مُجْتَهِد بانضباطه الشديد في أداء الواجبات المدرسية وحرصه على الحضور المبكر
examples.translation_english: The diligent student is known for his strict discipline in performing school assignments and his keenness on early attendance.
examples.translation_native: The diligent student is known for his strict discipline in performing school assignments and his keenness on early attendance.

examples.sentence: كان الفريق مُتَعَاوِن جداً في إنجاز المشروع الجماعي قبل الموعد النهائي المحدد من المعلم
examples.translation_english: The team was very cooperative in completing the group project before the deadline set by the teacher.
examples.translation_native: The team was very cooperative in completing the group project before the deadline set by the teacher.

examples.sentence: قدم الطالب حلاً مُبْتَكِر لمشكلة نقص المياه في مدرسته باستخدام تقنيات إعادة تدوير بسيطة
examples.translation_english: The student presented an innovative solution to the water shortage problem in his school using simple recycling techniques.
examples.translation_native: The student presented an innovative solution to the water shortage problem in his school using simple recycling techniques.

examples.sentence: يحتوي الكتاب على شرح مُعَقَّد للنظريات العلمية التي يصعب على المبتدئين فهمها بسهولة
examples.translation_english: The book contains a complex explanation of scientific theories that are difficult for beginners to understand easily.
examples.translation_native: The book contains a complex explanation of scientific theories that are difficult for beginners to understand easily.

examples.sentence: وفر المعلم ملخصاً مُبَسَّط للمادة الدراسية لمساعدة الطلاب على مراجعة الدروس قبل الاختبارات
examples.translation_english: The teacher provided a simplified summary of the course material to help students review lessons before exams.
examples.translation_native: The teacher provided a simplified summary of the course material to help students review lessons before exams.

examples.sentence: يجب على كل طالب اختيار موضوع مُحَدَّد لبحث التخرج والالتزام به طوال الفصل الدراسي
examples.translation_english: Every student must choose a specific topic for the graduation research and commit to it throughout the semester.
examples.translation_native: Every student must choose a specific topic for the graduation research and commit to it throughout the semester.

examples.sentence: ناقشنا في مادة العلوم أهمية مصادر الطاقة مُتَجَدِّد مثل الشمس والرياح للحفاظ على البيئة
examples.translation_english: We discussed in science the importance of renewable energy sources like the sun and wind to preserve the environment.
examples.translation_native: We discussed in science the importance of renewable energy sources like the sun and wind to preserve the environment.

examples.sentence: تمنح الجامعة شهادات مُعْتَمَد دولياً لجميع خريجيها في مختلف التخصصات العلمية والأدبية والتقنية
examples.translation_english: The university grants internationally accredited certificates to all its graduates in various scientific, literary, and technical majors.
examples.translation_native: The university grants internationally accredited certificates to all its graduates in various scientific, literary, and technical majors.

examples.sentence: كان الجهد الذي بذله الطلاب في المشروع مُقَدَّر من قبل لجنة التحكيم والأساتذة
examples.translation_english: The effort the students put into the project was appreciated by the jury and the professors.
examples.translation_native: The effort the students put into the project was appreciated by the jury and the professors.

examples.sentence: تم افتتاح مبنى المكتبة بعد أن أصبح مُجَدَّد بالكامل بأحدث الأجهزة والتقنيات التعليمية
examples.translation_english: The library building was opened after it became fully renovated with the latest educational devices and technologies.
examples.translation_native: The library building was opened after it became fully renovated with the latest educational devices and technologies.

examples.sentence: تستخدم المدرسة نظاماً تعليمياً مُتَطَوِّر يعتمد على التفاعل الرقمي والتعلم الذاتي للطلاب
examples.translation_english: The school uses an advanced educational system that relies on digital interaction and self-learning for students.
examples.translation_native: The school uses an advanced educational system that relies on digital interaction and self-learning for students.

examples.sentence: يُمنع دخول الطلاب إلى القاعة في حال وصولهم مُتَأَخِّر عن موعد بدء المحاضرة الرسمية
examples.translation_english: Students are prohibited from entering the hall if they arrive late for the official start time of the lecture.
examples.translation_native: Students are prohibited from entering the hall if they arrive late for the official start time of the lecture.

examples.sentence: يجب على الطالب الحفاظ على جدول دراسي مُتَوَازِن يجمع بين المذاكرة والأنشطة الترفيهية والرياضية
examples.translation_english: The student must maintain a balanced study schedule that combines studying with recreational and sports activities.
examples.translation_native: The student must maintain a balanced study schedule that combines studying with recreational and sports activities.

examples.sentence: يوفر المختبر العلمي أجهزة قياس مُتَعَدِّد لمساعدة الطلاب في إجراء تجارب الفيزياء والبيولوجيا
examples.translation_english: The science lab provides multiple measuring devices to help students conduct physics and biology experiments.
examples.translation_native: The science lab provides multiple measuring devices to help students conduct physics and biology experiments.

examples.sentence: يعد بيئة الفصل الدراسي مُحَفِّز للإبداع عندما يشجع المعلم الطلاب على طرح الأسئلة
examples.translation_english: The classroom environment is stimulating for creativity when the teacher encourages students to ask questions.
examples.translation_native: The classroom environment is stimulating for creativity when the teacher encourages students to ask questions.

examples.sentence: يعتبر استخدام الهواتف الذكية أثناء الشرح سلوكاً مُعَطِّل لتركيز الطلاب في الفصل الدراسي
examples.translation_english: Using smartphones during the explanation is considered a disruptive behavior for students' focus in the classroom.
examples.translation_native: Using smartphones during the explanation is considered a disruptive behavior for students' focus in the classroom.

examples.sentence: يجب على الباحث العلمي الحفاظ على موقف مُحَايِد عند تحليل البيانات لضمان دقة النتائج
examples.translation_english: The scientific researcher must maintain a neutral stance when analyzing data to ensure the accuracy of results.
examples.translation_native: The scientific researcher must maintain a neutral stance when analyzing data to ensure the accuracy of results.

examples.sentence: يعمل الطالب مُسَاعِد للمختبر في مساعدة المعلمين على إعداد التجارب العلمية قبل بدء الحصص
examples.translation_english: The student works as a lab assistant in helping teachers prepare scientific experiments before classes start.
examples.translation_native: The student works as a lab assistant in helping teachers prepare scientific experiments before classes start.

examples.sentence: قدم الطالب تقريراً مُتَضَمِّن كافة المراجع العلمية التي استخدمها في بحثه الدراسي الأخير
examples.translation_english: The student presented a report including all the scientific references he used in his last academic research.
examples.translation_native: The student presented a report including all the scientific references he used in his last academic research.

examples.sentence: يشجع المعلم الطلاب على إجراء بحث مُسْتَقِل لتطوير مهاراتهم في التفكير والبحث العلمي
examples.translation_english: The teacher encourages students to conduct independent research to develop their skills in thinking and scientific research.
examples.translation_native: The teacher encourages students to conduct independent research to develop their skills in thinking and scientific research.

examples.sentence: أظهر الطالب أسلوباً مُتَفَرِّد في حل المسائل الرياضية مما أثار إعجاب جميع الأساتذة
examples.translation_english: The student showed a unique style in solving mathematical problems which impressed all the professors.
examples.translation_native: The student showed a unique style in solving mathematical problems which impressed all the professors.

examples.sentence: يستخدم المعلم أساليب تدريس مُتَمَايِز لتلبية احتياجات الطلاب المختلفة في الفصل الدراسي الواحد
examples.translation_english: The teacher uses differentiated teaching methods to meet the different needs of students in one classroom.
examples.translation_native: The teacher uses differentiated teaching methods to meet the different needs of students in one classroom.

examples.sentence: يعد تخصص الطب مجالاً مُتَطَوِّر ومُتَطَلِّب جداً من حيث الجهد والوقت والتركيز الأكاديمي
examples.translation_english: Medicine is an advanced and very demanding field in terms of effort, time, and academic focus.
examples.translation_native: Medicine is an advanced and very demanding field in terms of effort, time, and academic focus.

examples.sentence: كانت نتائج الاختبارات ضمن النطاق مُتَوَقَّع بناءً على أداء الطلاب خلال الفصل الدراسي
examples.translation_english: The exam results were within the expected range based on the students' performance during the semester.
examples.translation_native: The exam results were within the expected range based on the students' performance during the semester.

examples.sentence: أصبح النجاح الأكاديمي مُتَحَقِّق بفضل التخطيط الجيد والالتزام بالجدول الدراسي طوال العام
examples.translation_english: Academic success became realized thanks to good planning and commitment to the study schedule all year.
examples.translation_native: Academic success became realized thanks to good planning and commitment to the study schedule all year.

examples.sentence: حقق فريق المدرسة الفوز في ثلاث مباريات مُتَعَاقِب ضمن بطولة كرة القدم الوطنية
examples.translation_english: The school team achieved victory in three consecutive matches within the national football championship.
examples.translation_native: The school team achieved victory in three consecutive matches within the national football championship.

examples.sentence: جلس الطالب مُتَأَمِّل في نتائج بحثه قبل كتابة الخاتمة النهائية للمقال العلمي
examples.translation_english: The student sat contemplative of his research results before writing the final conclusion of the scientific article.
examples.translation_native: The student sat contemplative of his research results before writing the final conclusion of the scientific article.

examples.sentence: كان الطالب مُتَذَمِّر من كثرة الواجبات المدرسية التي تتطلب وقتاً طويلاً لإنجازها
examples.translation_english: The student was complaining about the amount of school assignments that require a long time to complete.
examples.translation_native: The student was complaining about the amount of school assignments that require a long time to complete.

examples.sentence: كان الطلاب مُتَحَمِّس للمشاركة في الرحلة الميدانية إلى المتحف الوطني للعلوم والتكنولوجيا
examples.translation_english: The students were enthusiastic to participate in the field trip to the National Museum of Science and Technology.
examples.translation_native: The students were enthusiastic to participate in the field trip to the National Museum of Science and Technology.

examples.sentence: بقي الطالب مُتَرَدِّد في اختيار التخصص الجامعي حتى اللحظة الأخيرة قبل التقديم الرسمي
examples.translation_english: The student remained hesitant in choosing the university major until the last moment before the official application.
examples.translation_native: The student remained hesitant in choosing the university major until the last moment before the official application.

examples.sentence: حقق الطالب درجات عالية مُتَجَاوِز توقعات المعلمين في اختبار الرياضيات الصعب جداً
examples.translation_english: The student achieved high grades, surpassing the teachers' expectations in the very difficult math test.
examples.translation_native: The student achieved high grades, surpassing the teachers' expectations in the very difficult math test.

examples.sentence: وقف الطلاب مُتَضَامِن مع زملائهم في حملة التبرع لدعم الطلاب المحتاجين في المدرسة
examples.translation_english: The students stood in solidarity with their peers in the donation campaign to support needy students at school.
examples.translation_native: The students stood in solidarity with their peers in the donation campaign to support needy students at school.

examples.sentence: لاحظ المعلم أن أسلوب الكتابة لدى الطالبين كان مُتَشَابِه بشكل يثير الشك في النزاهة
examples.translation_english: The teacher noticed that the writing style of both students was similar in a way that raises suspicion of integrity.
examples.translation_native: The teacher noticed that the writing style of both students was similar in a way that raises suspicion of integrity.

examples.sentence: قدم الفريق مشروعاً مُتَكَامِل يجمع بين البرمجة والتصميم والتحليل الإحصائي للبيانات الضخمة
examples.translation_english: The team presented an integrated project combining programming, design, and statistical analysis of big data.
examples.translation_native: The team presented an integrated project combining programming, design, and statistical analysis of big data.

examples.sentence: كان أداء الطالب مُتَأَلِّق في العرض التقديمي أمام لجنة التحكيم في المسابقة العلمية
examples.translation_english: The student's performance was brilliant in the presentation before the jury in the scientific competition.
examples.translation_native: The student's performance was brilliant in the presentation before the jury in the scientific competition.

examples.sentence: رغم تفوقه الدراسي، كان الطالب مُتَوَاضِع جداً في تعامله مع زملائه ومعلميه دائماً
examples.translation_english: Despite his academic excellence, the student was very humble in his dealing with his peers and teachers always.
examples.translation_native: Despite his academic excellence, the student was very humble in his dealing with his peers and teachers always.

examples.sentence: استمر الطالب في اللعب بالهاتف مُتَجَاهِل تعليمات المعلم بضرورة التركيز في الدرس
examples.translation_english: The student continued playing with the phone, ignoring the teacher's instructions about the necessity of focusing in the lesson.
examples.translation_native: The student continued playing with the phone, ignoring the teacher's instructions about the necessity of focusing in the lesson.

examples.sentence: لا يحب الطلاب العمل مع زميلهم مُتَكَبِّر الذي يرفض الاستماع إلى آراء الآخرين مطلقاً
examples.translation_english: Students do not like working with their arrogant colleague who refuses to listen to others' opinions at all.
examples.translation_native: Students do not like working with their arrogant colleague who refuses to listen to others' opinions at all.

examples.sentence: بقي العمل في المختبر مُتَوَقِّف بسبب عطل فني في أجهزة القياس الحساسة جداً
examples.translation_english: Work in the lab remained stopped due to a technical failure in the very sensitive measuring devices.
examples.translation_native: Work in the lab remained stopped due to a technical failure in the very sensitive measuring devices.

examples.sentence: عمل الطالب مُتَطَوِّع في تنظيم مكتبة المدرسة خلال أوقات الفراغ لخدمة زملائه الطلاب
examples.translation_english: The student worked as a volunteer in organizing the school library during free time to serve his fellow students.
examples.translation_native: The student worked as a volunteer in organizing the school library during free time to serve his fellow students.

examples.sentence: يتطلب النجاح الدراسي جهداً مُتَوَاصِل من الطالب طوال أيام الفصل الدراسي المليء بالتحديات
examples.translation_english: Academic success requires continuous effort from the student throughout the days of the challenging semester.
examples.translation_native: Academic success requires continuous effort from the student throughout the days of the challenging semester.
